kg 8

title: S-160T2W/S-B cooling capacity
summary: Cooling capacity 16000 W, input power 3990 W, 380V 3N~50Hz

title: S-160T2W/S-B water flow rate
summary: Water flow 3.3 m3/h, water pressure drop 36 kPa

title: S-160T2W/S-B noise level
summary: Noise 48 dB(A)

title: Water quality pH standard
summary: Cooling water pH 6.5~8.2 for circulating water, 6.0~8.0 for supply water

title: Water quality chloride ion limit
summary: Chloride ion less than 200 mg/l for circulating water, less than 50 mg/l for supply water
evidence_quote: 氯离子(Cl―mg/ l ) 少于200 少于50

title: Water quality total hardness limit
summary: Total hardness less than 200 mg/l CaCO3 for circulating water, less than 70 mg/l for supply water
evidence_quote: 总硬度 (CaCO 3mg/ l ) 少于200 少于70

title: Water system maximum pressure
summary: Water system maximum pressure 1 MPa

title: Operating environment temperature range
summary: Operating environment 17°C to 38°C dry bulb, inlet water temperature ≤34°C, relative humidity 30%~95%
evidence_quote: 38℃≥整机工作环境≥17℃（ 干球温度） ，进水温度≤3 4℃，相对湿度 30%～95%

title: Rated test conditions
summary: Rated conditions: indoor 27°C DB/19°C WB, inlet water 30°C, outlet water 35°C
evidence_quote: 标称能力测试条件：室内干球温度 27℃、湿球温度 19℃、出水温度 35℃、进水温度 30℃

title: Power supply voltage range
summary: Power supply 380V 3N~50Hz, allowable range 342V to 418V
evidence_quote: 机组只能使用 380V 3N～50Hz额定电源，电压最大可允许范围 [342V--- 418V]

title: Minimum installation spacing
summary: Minimum spacing A, B, C, D ≥1200 mm

title: Refrigerant additional charge for long piping
summary: For 35,50 models add 0.015 kg/m for pipe length over 5m; for 71,80,90 add 0.03 kg/m; for 112,120,140,160 add 0.06 kg/m

title: Maximum piping length and height difference
summary: Maximum height difference 10 m, maximum pipe length 30 m, maximum bends 10
evidence_quote: 高度差最大 10m，管道长度最大 30m，弯曲处数目最多 10处

title: V-belt tension adjustment
summary: V-belt tension: deformation about 20 mm when pressed with one finger
evidence_quote: 用一个手指压住皮带，变形约为 20mm

title: Water source heat pump operating limits
summary: Heating: water 15~30°C, best 20°C, indoor ≤27°C; Cooling: water ≤40°C, indoor ≥18°C; Dehumidification: indoor ≥16°C, RH≥80%
evidence_quote:
制热运行：水温 15℃以上， 30℃以下，最佳 20℃，室内温度 27℃以下；
制冷运行：水温 40℃以下，室内温度 18℃以上；
除湿运行：室内温度 16℃以上，相对湿度在 80%以上

title: Cooling tower water quality pH requirement
summary: Circulating water pH 6~8, turbidity ≤5.0 mg/L, iron ≤0.3 mg/L, total hardness CaCO3 ≤50 ppm
evidence_quote: 循环水要求 PH值为6～8，浑浊度不大于 5.0毫克/升，含铁量不大于 0.3毫克/升，全硬度 CaCO 3不大于50ppm

title: Power supply manual switch and fuse ratings for L35/S(D)-D
summary: Manual switch 75 A, fuse 50 A, power cable 10 mm2 (<30m)

title: Power supply manual switch and fuse ratings for L165/S(D)-D
summary: Manual switch 200 A, fuse 150 A, power cable 50 mm2 (<30m)
